endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProvider}/{resourceTypeName}/{resourceName}/metrics
endpoints.description: **Post the metric values for a resource**.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDER}} with a real resourceprovider. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RESOURCETYPENAME}} with a real resourcetypename.
